span.p:
Single tutorial step with
drop above 15%?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX THE SPECIFIC STEP
investigate loop signal before patching feature

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TUTORIAL DESIGN ISSUE
session is too long or the hook is too weak

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STABILITY ISSUE
D1 is suppressed by crashes - fix before re-measuring retention

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Average Day-0 sessions
per retained player above 2?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CORE LOOP HOOK ISSUE
the loop is not pulling players back within day 0 - redesign loop beat

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DIFFICULTY OR PACING ISSUE
players are returning but not making it to day 1 - check balance and reward cadence
